text.title: Proposal Red Team Checklist Decision Tree
text.summary: Tree mapping observable signals (trigger present, owner named, killer-anchor populated, pause-point size, staleness) to run / suppress / repair-anchors / refresh-cadence.

decision-tree.root-question: scheduled trigger (weekly fixed-price bid block) fired?

conclusion.verdict: skip-this-methodology — fire only on named trigger; do not run ad-hoc

branch.question: header.owner.person populated AND in stakeholder register?

conclusion.verdict: defer; do not run anonymous checklist; resolve ownership first
refresh-cadence: run quarterly review first; only then run session

branch.question: every item has executor + artefact + killer_anchor?

conclusion.verdict: repair-anchors: re-populate failing items with real incident_id/postmortem/policy; reject decorative items
split pause-points > 9 items; merge or extend pause-points < 5
run-the-checklist in declared mode (READ-DO or DO-CONFIRM); record findings

text.example: trigger=Friday block → owner=dm-handle → last_reviewed=2026-04-10 (fresh) → all anchors present → all pause-points 5-9 → run DO-CONFIRM session.
